seo.title: AI Brand Promotion - Promotion Assets and Analytics
seo.description: Use AiToEarn to create and manage draft boxes. Generate videos and image assets in batches with AI, and track views, likes, comments, shares, and other performance metrics in real time.
seo.keywords: brand promotion, AI promotion assets, draft box management, AI video generation, social media promotion, content publishing, marketing analytics, AI marketing tools, brand exposure, offline promotion, AiToEarn
